title: Ubiquiti AirFiber AF-5XHD, 1Gbps+, 4.8 - 6.2GHz (price per piece)
description: Our core communications processing engine surpasses all of the limitations inherent to generic Wi-Fi chips Spectral Efficiency Comparison of 802.11n, 802.11ac, airFiber Original, and LTU by year AirFiber 5XHD is Water Resistant and Perfect for any Weather Conditions AF-5XHD is a proprietary, pure ptp solution that is not compatible with any LTU ptmp product from Ubiquiti Device GPS holder + GPS antenna PoE power adapter 24V/1A Power cord Metal strap + 2 zip ties Universal Bracket
